heading: Next Steps
body:
If you continue to grow your cluster, consider
scaling your cluster to support more
users and operations.

You can load a sample dataset to quickly start experimenting with data
in MongoDB and using tools such as the [Atlas UI](atlas-ui)
and [MongoDB Charts](charts). To learn more, see
[Load Sample Data Into Atlas](sample-data).

You can also generate synthetic data. To learn more, see
[Generate Synthetic Data](synthetic-data).
